title: rubus gracilis var. aitchisonii
intro: Rubus gracilis var. aitchisonii, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species within the Rubus genus, characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rubus gracilis var. aitchisonii include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its fruits can be consumed raw or used in jams and preserves.
